name: ExtensionAppointment_CancellationDate
title: R5: When the appointment was cancelled (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Appointment.cancellationDate` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Appointment.cancellationDate` 0..1 `dateTime`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Appointment.cancellationDate` 0..1 `dateTime`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Appointment.cancellationDate` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.
Element `Appointment.cancellationDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: When the appointment was cancelled (new)
element.comment:
Element `Appointment.cancellationDate` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.
Element `Appointment.cancellationDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If the appointment was cancelled multiple times, this would reflect the most recent cancellation.

element.definition: The date/time describing when the appointment was cancelled.
element.comment: If the appointment was cancelled multiple times, this would reflect the most recent cancellation.
